protocols.Paper_title: Endoplasmic Reticulum Detergent-Resistant Membranes Accommodate Hepatitis C Virus Proteins for Viral Assembly
protocols.Evidence: infected cells lysed with Triton X-100 (Tx) buffer; lysates were subjected to flotation-gradient fractionation and immunoblotting

protocols.Paper_title: Endoplasmic Reticulum Detergent-Resistant Membranes Accommodate Hepatitis C Virus Proteins for Viral Assembly
protocols.Evidence: cell lysates were prepared with Triton X-100 buffer plus freezing (TxF) and analyzed by immunoprecipitation/immunoblotting

protocols.Paper_title: Endoplasmic Reticulum Detergent-Resistant Membranes Accommodate Hepatitis C Virus Proteins for Viral Assembly
protocols.Evidence: cells lysed with Tx buffer then frozen/thawed and treated with n-octyl-β-D-glucopyranoside buffer (TxnO)

protocols.Paper_title: Endoplasmic Reticulum Detergent-Resistant Membranes Accommodate Hepatitis C Virus Proteins for Viral Assembly
protocols.Evidence: cells were lysed with Triton X-100 (Tx) buffer; the resulting cell lysate was subjected to immunoprecipitation

protocols.Paper_title: Endoplasmic Reticulum Detergent-Resistant Membranes Accommodate Hepatitis C Virus Proteins for Viral Assembly
protocols.Evidence: lysed with Triton X-100 buffer + freezing (TxF); Core was quantified by... chemiluminescence immunoassay after immunoprecipitation

protocols.Paper_title: Endoplasmic Reticulum Detergent-Resistant Membranes Accommodate Hepatitis C Virus Proteins for Viral Assembly
protocols.Evidence: lysed with... Triton X-100 buffer + freezing + n-octyl-β-D-glucopyranoside buffer (TxnO)
